app.title: Canvas API Permissions Planner
language.label: Language
language.tooltip: Choose a language. Canvas permission labels are translated by the Canvas community; app interface labels are translated by AI.
permissions.heading: Permissions
permissions.optionalDescription: These permissions are not required to call the endpoints, but unlock additional data in responses.
permissions.empty: Add endpoints to see required permissions
permissions.noAdditional: No additional permissions required for the selected endpoints
permissions.anyOfTooltip: Your API user needs at least one of these permissions. Any single one is sufficient to satisfy this requirement.
permissions.optionalNote: These permissions unlock additional data fields. Review the notes to decide if your integration needs them.
endpoints.heading: Add Endpoints
endpoints.pasteTooltip: Paste one endpoint per line. Accepted formats: full URL, path only, or METHOD /path. Query strings are ignored. Numeric IDs and SIS IDs (e.g. sis_course_id:ABC) are recognised.
endpoints.pastePlaceholder: One endpoint per line, e.g. GET /api/v1/courses/:id
selectedEndpoints.heading: Selected Endpoints
error.localeLoadFailedMessage: Could not load {{locale}} labels — showing in English
help.howToUse.step1: Select or paste the API endpoint paths your integration calls.
help.howToUse.step2: The Required Permissions panel lists every Canvas role permission your API user needs.
help.howToUse.step3: Review the Optional Permissions section — these unlock additional data in API responses (e.g. SIS IDs, email addresses, unpublished content).
help.howToUse.step4: Set up a custom Canvas role (or edit an existing one) with exactly these permissions enabled.
help.permissions.rbac.heading: Role-Based Access Control
help.permissions.rbac.body: Permissions are granted to roles, not users. Users inherit permissions via enrollment (course role) or account membership (account role).
help.permissions.orGroups.heading: OR groups
help.permissions.orGroups.body: When the tool shows "Any one of: A or B or C", any single permission from that list is sufficient. You do not need all of them.
help.permissions.optional.heading: Optional permissions
help.permissions.optional.body: Some endpoints return extra data when the caller has additional permissions. These are shown separately as Optional Permissions with a note explaining what they unlock — for example, SIS ID fields, email addresses, login IDs, or unpublished content. The endpoint works without them; you just get fewer fields or records.
help.permissions.featureFlags.heading: Feature flags
help.permissions.featureFlags.body: A small number of permissions require a Canvas feature flag to be enabled before they appear in the Permissions UI. These are noted on individual endpoints.
share.copyFailed: Could not copy link to clipboard
share.staleLinkMessage: This link was created with an older dataset and can't be resolved.
share.endpointsDroppedMessage: {{count}} endpoint(s) from this link no longer exist in the current dataset and were removed: {{endpoints}}
notes.perm.requiredIfModifyingGradingAtt: Required if modifying grading attributes with existing submissions
notes.perm.requiredIfReferencingThisEnti: Required if referencing this entity by SIS ID in the URL
notes.perm.requiredToChangeSisIdOnTheGro: Required to change SIS ID on the group category
notes.perm.requiredToChangePublishedStat: Required to change published state, lock, pin, or set as announcement
notes.perm.requiredToReceiveSisIdFieldsI: Required to receive SIS ID fields in response
notes.perm.requiredToReceiveEmailAddress: Required to receive email addresses in response
notes.perm.requiredToReceiveLoginIdSisLo: Required to receive login_id / sis_login_id in response
notes.perm.requiredToReceiveSisImportIdI: Required to receive sis_import_id in response
notes.perm.requiredToSeeAllStudentsAssig: Required to see all students' assignment data
notes.perm.requiredToSeeFullAccountDetai: Required to see full account details
notes.perm.requiredToSeeFullTemplateDeta: Required to see full template details
notes.perm.requiredToSeeGradeDataForAllS: Required to see grade data for all students
notes.perm.requiredToSeePeerReviewDetail: Required to see peer review details for all students
notes.perm.requiredToSeeUnpublishedDiscu: Required to see unpublished discussion topics
notes.perm.requiredToSendToAllCourseMemb: Required to send to all course members at once
notes.perm.requiredToSetSisIdOnTheGroupC: Required to set SIS ID on the group category
notes.perm.requiredToSetSisCourseId: Required to set SIS course ID
notes.perm.requiredToSetTopicAsAnnouncem: Required to set topic as announcement or pin it
notes.perm.requiredToUpdateSisCourseId: Required to update SIS course ID
notes.perm.requiredToUpdateSisLoginId: Required to update SIS login ID
notes.perm.requiredToUpdateNameEmailOrLo: Required to update name, email, or login details for other users
notes.perm.requiredToUpdateSettingsForOt: Required to update settings for other users
notes.perm.requiredToUploadFilesOnBehalf: Required to upload files on behalf of another student
notes.perm.requiredToViewProgressForOthe: Required to view progress for other users
notes.perm.requiredToWriteSisIdFields: Required to write SIS ID fields
notes.endpoint.acceptAnEnrollmentInvitat: Accept an enrollment invitation. Only the invited user can accept.
notes.endpoint.adminDeletionOfAGlobalAnn: Admin deletion of a global announcement.
notes.endpoint.alsoRequiresUserToHaveASt: Also requires user to have a student enrollment and account self-registration to be enabled.
notes.endpoint.batchRetrieveOverridesFor: Batch retrieve overrides for multiple assignments.
notes.endpoint.batchUpdateCoursesInAnAcc: Batch update courses in an account.
notes.endpoint.bulkEnrollmentAtTheAccoun: Bulk enrollment at the account level.
notes.endpoint.courseTeachersAdminsCanUp: Course teachers/admins can update their own courses.
notes.endpoint.createsAGradebookFilterFo: Creates a gradebook filter for the current user.
notes.endpoint.gradesASubmissionOrAddsAC: Grades a submission or adds a comment.
notes.endpoint.hidesAStreamItemFromTheCu: Hides a stream item from the current user's activity stream.
notes.endpoint.hidesAllStreamItemsFromTh: Hides all stream items from the current user's activity stream.
notes.endpoint.initiatesAFileUploadForTh: Initiates a file upload for the user's personal files.
notes.endpoint.initiatesAFileUploadToThe: Initiates a file upload to the group.
notes.endpoint.listsAccessTokensForAUser: Lists access tokens for a user.
notes.endpoint.listsAccountCalendarsVisi: Lists account calendars visible to the current user.
notes.endpoint.listsEnrollmentsForAUserU: Lists enrollments for a user. Users can list their own enrollments.
notes.endpoint.listsFilesInAFolderRequir: Lists files in a folder. Requires read access on the folder.
notes.endpoint.listsFilesInTheUsersPerso: Lists files in the user's personal files area.
notes.endpoint.listsGroupsTheCurrentUser: Lists groups the current user belongs to.
notes.endpoint.listsSubfoldersRequiresRe: Lists subfolders. Requires read access on the folder.
notes.endpoint.mergesOneUserAccountIntoA: Merges one user account into another. Requires site admin.
notes.endpoint.queryGradeChangeAuditLogs: Query grade change audit logs with filters.
notes.endpoint.rejectAnEnrollmentInvitat: Reject an enrollment invitation. Only the invited user can reject.
notes.endpoint.requiresAbilityToViewTheU: Requires ability to view the user. Admins can view any user in their account.
notes.endpoint.requiresRatingToBeEnabled: Requires rating to be enabled on the topic.
notes.endpoint.requiresTheAccountSetting: Requires the account setting 'admins_can_view_notifications' to be enabled.
notes.endpoint.reserveATimeSlotInAnAppoi: Reserve a time slot in an appointment group.
notes.endpoint.returnsASummaryOfTheCurre: Returns a summary of the current user's activity stream.
notes.endpoint.returnsATemporaryPublicDo: Returns a temporary public download URL. Requires download access on the file.
notes.endpoint.returnsAccountsTheCurrent: Returns accounts the current user has access to. No specific permission required beyond authentication.
notes.endpoint.returnsAccountsTheUserCan: Returns accounts the user can create courses in.
notes.endpoint.returnsCalendarEventsForT: Returns calendar events for the current user's visible contexts.
notes.endpoint.returnsCourseDetailsEnrol: Returns course details. Enrolled users and admins can view.
notes.endpoint.returnsCoursesForTheSpeci: Returns courses for the specified user. The current user can list their own courses.
notes.endpoint.returnsCoursesTheCurrentU: Returns courses the current user is enrolled in or has access to.
notes.endpoint.returnsCustomColorsForThe: Returns custom colors for the user. Users can view their own.
notes.endpoint.returnsDashboardCardsForT: Returns dashboard cards for the current user.
notes.endpoint.returnsEnrollmentTermsAcc: Returns enrollment terms. Accessible to users with any account role.
notes.endpoint.returnsFileDetailsRequire: Returns file details. Requires read access on the file's context.
notes.endpoint.returnsFolderDetailsRequi: Returns folder details. Requires read access on the folder's context.
notes.endpoint.returnsGlobalAnnouncement: Returns global announcements for the current user.
notes.endpoint.returnsMissingSubmissions: Returns missing submissions for a student.
notes.endpoint.returnsPermissionFlagsFor: Returns permission flags for the current user in this account.
Returns permission flags for the current user in this course.
notes.endpoint.returnsTheCountOfTheCurre: Returns the count of the current user's TODO items.
notes.endpoint.returnsTheCurrentUsersTod: Returns the current user's TODO items.
notes.endpoint.returnsTheCurrentUsersAct: Returns the current user's activity stream.
notes.endpoint.returnsTheCurrentUsersOwn: Returns the current user's own gradebook filters.
notes.endpoint.returnsTheCurrentUsersUpc: Returns the current user's upcoming events.
notes.endpoint.returnsUserSettingsUsersC: Returns user settings. Users can view their own settings.
notes.endpoint.revertsAPageToAPreviousRe: Reverts a page to a previous revision.
notes.endpoint.setsACustomColorForAConte: Sets a custom color for a context. Users can set their own.
notes.endpoint.splitsAPreviouslyMergedUs: Splits a previously merged user. Requires site admin.
notes.endpoint.studentsCanAlsoViewTheirO: Students can also view their own submissions without these permissions.
notes.endpoint.studentsSelectAMasteryPat: Students select a mastery path option.
notes.endpoint.studentsSubmitTheirOwnWor: Students submit their own work. No specific role permission required.
notes.endpoint.theEventParameterDetermin: The event parameter determines which permission is checked: 'delete' or 'conclude'.
notes.endpoint.theSpecificPermissionDepe: The specific permission depends on the enrollment type being created.
The specific permission depends on the enrollment type being removed.
notes.endpoint.topicAuthorCanEditTheirOw: Topic author can edit their own topic content.
notes.endpoint.uploadAFileToAttachToASub: Upload a file to attach to a submission comment.
notes.endpoint.usersCanViewTheirOwnConve: Users can view their own conversations.
notes.endpoint.usersCanViewTheirOwnSubmi: Users can view their own submissions. Instructors can view any student's submission.
